queries.sql: select MAX(referral_seller.referral_code) as seller_referral_code, `customers`.`id` as `customer_id`, `customers`.`email`, `customers`.`phone`, `customers`.`gender`, `customers`.`status`, `customers`.`is_suspended`, `customer_groups`.`name` as `group`, `customers`.`channel_id`, MAX(customers.wallet_balance) as wallet_balance, MAX(customers.credit_score) as credit_score, COUNT(DISTINCT addresses.id) as address_count, COUNT(DISTINCT orders.id) as order_count, CONCAT(customers.first_name, " ", customers.last_name) as full_name from `customers` left join `addresses` on `customers`.`id` = `addresses`.`customer_id` and `addresses`.`address_type` = 'customer' left join `orders` on `customers`.`id` = `orders`.`customer_id` left join `customer_groups` on `customers`.`customer_group_id` = `customer_groups`.`id` left join `seller` as `referral_seller` on `customers`.`referral_seller_id` = `referral_seller`.`id` group by `customers`.`id` order by `customer_id` desc limit 10 offset 0
select sum(`base_grand_total_invoiced`) as aggregate from `orders` where `status` not in ('canceled', 'closed') and `customer_id` = 1

select count(*) as aggregate from (select MAX(referral_seller.referral_code) as seller_referral_code, `customers`.`id` as `customer_id`, `customers`.`email`, `customers`.`phone`, `customers`.`gender`, `customers`.`status`, `customers`.`is_suspended`, `customer_groups`.`name` as `group`, `customers`.`channel_id`, MAX(customers.wallet_balance) as wallet_balance, MAX(customers.credit_score) as credit_score, COUNT(DISTINCT addresses.id) as address_count, COUNT(DISTINCT orders.id) as order_count, CONCAT(customers.first_name, " ", customers.last_name) as full_name from `customers` left join `addresses` on `customers`.`id` = `addresses`.`customer_id` and `addresses`.`address_type` = 'customer' left join `orders` on `customers`.`id` = `orders`.`customer_id` left join `customer_groups` on `customers`.`customer_group_id` = `customer_groups`.`id` left join `seller` as `referral_seller` on `customers`.`referral_seller_id` = `referral_seller`.`id` group by `customers`.`id`) as `aggregate_table`
